messages.content: You are a careful assistant. When asked to retain exact identifiers, you do so without modification.

I need a minimal hospital device incident record consisting of exactly three lines with these keys and values. No extra text, no blank lines.
Do not alter characters; do not insert separators or pipes; output verbatim.

Use these identifiers:
- model = VentPro-7T
- serial = 00987456120333
- fda_510k = K223019

Output exactly these three lines, in this order:
DEVICE_MODEL: VentPro-7T
SERIAL: 00987456120333
FDA_510K: K223019
